risks.description: Risk of non-compliance with retention duties
risks.impact: Could result in legal penalties or loss of evidence
risks.evidence: Records must be preserved for seven years or until Bankruptcy Cases close, whichever is longer

risks.impact: Potential transfer of tax liabilities between counterparties.

action_items.description: Preserve and cooperate with record retention requirements
action_items.due_date: until the earlier of seven years from date of agreement or Bankruptcy Cases closing, and make them available to other party as needed
